bug.description: HARQ process error such as incorrect retransmission or wrong redundancy version

prompt:
There is a HARQ process error such as incorrect retransmission or wrong redundancy version downstream of function m2ap_eNB_task in the openair2/M2AP subsystem.
The function is located at openair2/M2AP/m2ap_eNB.c:535.
Please investigate and fix this issue.
